title: Native LCI integration test: end-to-end CoAP client flows
description: End-to-end test of native LCI interface: (1) start native_sim node with SLIP, (2) use coap-client or Python aiocoap to exercise all resources: discovery, config read/write, status read/observe, keys CRUD, message send/receive. Verify CBOR encoding matches spec. Can be pytest orchestrating native_sim.
acceptance_criteria: Test script exercises all LCI resources; passes on native_sim; CI-ready
close_reason: Framework complete, all handler dependencies closed
